- **West of House**: Open field, white house with boarded front door. Mailbox (open, empty). Leaflet dropped here.
- **Kitchen** (white house, east of Living Room): Table, brown sack (taken), garlic (taken), bottle of water (taken), lunch (taken).
- **Living Room** (white house, west of Kitchen): 
  - Trophy case (empty — deposit treasures here!)
  - Brass lantern (taken, ON)
  - Sword (taken)
  - Rug moved aside → **Trap Door revealed** (closed)
  - Exits: East → Kitchen

## Items Carried
- Clove of garlic
- Lunch
- Brown sack
- Glass bottle (with water)
- Brass lantern (ON)
- Sword

## Items / Locations of Interest
- Leaflet: dropped at West of House (worthless)
- Trophy case: in Living Room — this is where treasures go for scoring!

## Puzzles / Notes
- Trap door under rug in Living Room → leads DOWN (underground = main dungeon!)
- Trophy case is empty — need to find treasures and bring them here
- Score: 10/350 — lots to do!

> examine fireplace
I don't know the word "fireplace".

> move rug
With a great effort, the rug is moved to one side of the room, revealing the dusty cover of a closed trap door.

> open trap door
The door reluctantly opens to reveal a rickety staircase descending into darkness.
somaSnapshot.inner_voice: I notice a **trap door** has been revealed under the rug! This is clearly a way down into the underground. I should open it and descend. But first, let me update my memory and act!
